default.name: Default Theme
default.description: The good old default Starcord theme.
default.author: Starcord

material-white.name: Material White Theme
material-white.description: An actual light mode theme for people with social anxiety. Not recommended for use in dark environments.
material-white.author: Tousend1000

material-black.name: Material Black Theme
material-black.description: A simple and clean dark theme.
material-black.author: Tousend1000

material-black-plus.name: Material Black+ Theme
material-black-plus.description: A darker version of the Material Black theme.
material-black-plus.author: Tousend1000

material-black-plus-plus.name: Material Black++ Theme
material-black-plus-plus.description: The darkness itself. An even darker version of the Material Black+ theme.
material-black-plus-plus.author: Tousend1000

space.name: Space Theme
space.description: A theme inspired by the vast emptiness of space. Perfect for those who want to feel like they're floating in the void.
space.author: Tousend1000

flashbang.name: Flashbang Theme
flashbang.description: The light itself. Not recommended for long-term use unless you want to blind yourself.
flashbang.author: Tousend1000

eyebleach.name: Eyebleach Theme
eyebleach.description: A theme which is identical to bleach. For those who want to punish themselves.
eyebleach.author: Tousend1000

hallucination.name: Hallucination Theme
hallucination.description: Are you sure it's just the theme? Not recommended for use in public.
hallucination.author: Tousend1000
